name: AP 2-D Art and Design
notes: AP 2-D Art and Design is a portfolio submission, not a timed written exam. The primary apcentral URL 404'd; used the apstudents assessment page. The assessment has two portfolio sections: Sustained Investigation (15 digital images + written evidence, 60% of score) and Selected Works (5 digital images of 5 artworks, 40% of score). Verbatim: 'The three Art and Design Portfolio Exams (2-D, 3-D, Drawing) consist of two sections: Sustained Investigation (60% of total score) and Selected Works (40% of total score).' No MCQ or FRQ sit-down exam exists. Dataset values mcqCount=0, frqCount=0, totalMinutes=0, mcqMinutes='pending', frqMinutes='pending' are consistent with a portfolio-only course, though 'pending' would more accurately be 'n/a' since no timed sections exist.
